title: The American Venus
writer: Townsend Martin, Frederick Stowers, Robert Benchley
actors: Esther Ralston, Lawrence Gray, Ford Sterling
plot: Mary Gray, whose father manufactures cold cream, is engaged to sappy Horace Niles, the son of Hugo Niles, the elder Gray's most competitive rival in the cosmetics business. Chip Armstrong, a hot-shot public relations man, quits th...
